---
title: "Informe operativo"
subtitle: "Clústeres de detecciones NASA FIRMS"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(htmltools)

read_optional_csv <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path) || file.info(path)$size == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
  tryCatch(readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE), error = function(e) tibble::tibble())
}

alerts <- read_optional_csv("data/processed/operational_alerts.csv")
alerts_summary <- read_optional_csv("data/processed/operational_alerts_summary.csv")
report_path <- if (file.exists("data/processed/operational_report.md")) {
  "data/processed/operational_report.md"
} else if (file.exists("assets/alerts/operational_report.md")) {
  "assets/alerts/operational_report.md"
} else {
  NA_character_
}
```

::: {.callout-important}
Este informe es **informativo**. No sustituye a AEMET, EFFIS/Copernicus, NASA FIRMS, Protección Civil ni servicios de emergencia.
:::

```{r summary-cards, results='asis'}
if (nrow(alerts_summary) > 0) {
  htmltools::tags$div(
    class = "summary-grid",
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Alertas"), htmltools::tags$strong(alerts_summary$n_alertas[1])),
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Altas"), htmltools::tags$strong(alerts_summary$n_alertas_altas[1])),
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Medias"), htmltools::tags$strong(alerts_summary$n_alertas_medias[1])),
    htmltools::tags$div(class = "summary-card", htmltools::tags$span("Radio clúster"), htmltools::tags$strong(paste0(alerts_summary$cluster_km[1], " km")))
  )
} else {
  cat("No hay resumen de alertas. Ejecuta `Rscript scripts/99_run_all.R`.")
}
```

## Alertas principales

```{r alerts-table}
if (nrow(alerts) > 0) {
  alerts |>
    select(
      ID = cluster_id,
      Nivel = alerta_operativa,
      Score = score,
      Focos = n_focos,
      `≤6 h` = n_ultimas_6h,
      `≤24 h` = n_ultimas_24h,
      `FRP total MW` = frp_total_mw,
      `FRP máximo MW` = frp_max_mw,
      `Edad mínima h` = edad_min_h,
      `Última detección UTC` = ultima_deteccion_utc,
      Lat = latitude,
      Lon = longitude
    ) |>
    knitr::kable()
} else {
  cat("No hay alertas operativas para el periodo seleccionado.")
}
```

## Informe Markdown generado

```{r md-report, results='asis'}
if (!is.na(report_path)) {
  cat(paste(readLines(report_path, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8"), collapse = "\n"))
} else {
  cat("No se encontró `operational_report.md`.")
}
```
